candidates.why: This is the only explicit operating D&A line tied to COGS. However, it appears to be a component of the selected total COGS rows because 'Cost of Goods Sold' and 'Cost of revenues/COGS' equal the sum of 'Amortization in COR/COGS' and 'Other Cost of Goods Sold'. Adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket uses total COGS rows, and the explicit COGS amortization line is embedded within those totals.

candidates.why: Relevant operating D&A candidate for SG&A. But it appears embedded in the selected SG&A component bucket: 'Marketing expenses' matches 'Marketing expenses - Balancing value' plus 'Amortization in SGA', indicating this amortization is already included in the selected parent row.

Relevant operating D&A candidate for overhead/R&D. But it appears to be a component of the selected 'Research and development costs' row because that total matches 'Amortization in R&D' plus 'Research and development costs - Balancing value'. Also, 'Research and development costs' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding R&D amortization separately would distort the intended subtraction logic.

variables.notes: No separate SG&A D&A row should be added. 'Amortization in SGA' and 'Amortization in R&D' both appear to be sub-components already embedded in selected parent rows, and R&D is already handled symmetrically through XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
